fields.description:
YOU. BETTER. WITH ALAN.

Alan is building a vertically integrated health partner that unites insurance and smart healthcare delivery into one seamless system. Our vision is to make prevention the new norm of care for all.

Our mission: Help people live in good health to 100 while helping employers feel proud, turning health benefits from a cost centre into their most valuable investment.

By connecting all aspects of care (private, public, and direct to consumer) we create the most member-centric healthcare experience, reducing claims costs while generating new monetization opportunities.

We partner with tens of thousands of companies across France 🇫🇷, Spain 🇪🇸, Belgium 🇧🇪, and Canada 🇨🇦, serving over a million members.


HOW WE WORK: OUR LEADERSHIP PRINCIPLES

 - Mission is the Boss — We think long-term and are methodical optimists who take risks, seeking our mission's success above all else.

 - Distributed Ownership — Accountable enlightened despots: everyone owns their decisions and results.

 - Radical Transparency — All information is accessible and written-first, so everyone can make the best decisions asynchronously.

 - Always Growing — Direct, positive, and caring feedback, combined with self-growth ownership.


⭐️ THE BRAND MARKETER JOB ⭐️

We're looking for a Brand Marketer to build and scale Alan's brand presence in Belgium. You'll be responsible for driving growth through our brand, and establishing Alan as the leading health insurance brand.

Belgium is a highly strategic market for Alan. This role will shape how we show up locally, bringing global brand excellence to life while creating campaigns that resonate authentically. You'll have significant autonomy to build our brand presence, with a clear mandate and a budget to make an impact.

Your primary success goal is to drive branded organic traffic growth. You'll own the strategy and execution for making Alan a top-of-mind brand in Belgium, building a local brand planning that maximizes reach, memorability and as a consequence traffic impact. You'll track performance, identify what resonates with Belgian audiences, and continuously optimize your approach to accelerate growth. You'll have autonomy, and responsibility, over a local budget to deploy to achieve these objectives.

You’ll leverage:

 1. Bring global brand campaigns to life in Belgium. You'll take Alan's global brand initiatives and make them locally relevant, adapting messaging for Dutch and French audiences, incorporating Belgian cultural moments, and ensuring proper market timing. You'll be our eyes and ears on the ground, translating global strategy into campaigns that drive results in Belgium.

 2. Create high-impact local brand initiatives. You'll identify and execute Belgian-specific opportunities to build brand awareness and drive traffic: campaigns targeting key audiences (management companies, entrepreneurs, HR) through tactics you deem fitting: event activations, out-of-home advertising, micro-influencer collaborations, ….

 3. Lead press campaigns. You'll coordinate media opportunities, manage press releases for global and Belgian milestones to help position Alan's voice in Belgian health insurance conversations.

You'll collaborate closely with the global Brand crew for strategic alignment while having full ownership of the Belgian roadmap, execution, and budget. You'll work cross-functionally with local sales, growth, and product teams to ensure brand initiatives support business objectives for Belgium.

⭐ Is it you we're looking for?

The ideal candidate is a hands-on brand marketer who knows how to get things done, who loves bringing campaigns to life, and can operate independently with entrepreneurial energy. You're excited about the opportunity to shape Alan's brand presence in a fast-growing market, balancing global consistency with local relevance, and seeing your work directly impact business growth.

You may be a great fit at Alan if you have/are:

 - 5+ years experience in brand marketing, communications, or related roles

 - Full English fluency (written and spoken)

 - Native-level Dutch (bilingual Dutch/French is a strong plus)

 - Scrappy and resourceful: Proven track record creating and executing successful brand campaigns with limited budgets and resources

 - Creative problem-solver: Ability to achieve big impact through frugal, innovative approaches rather than heavy spending

 - Data-driven: Strong analytical skills with ability to measure campaign impact and ROI

 - Budget-conscious: Experience efficiently managing budgets with a focus on maximizing ROI through creative, scrappy solutions

 - Experience with press relations and media coordination in a B2B market.

 - Excellent storytelling and content creation skills across channels

 - Entrepreneurial mindset: you're a self-starter who thrives building in fast-paced environments

 - Comfortable with ambiguity: You navigate independently, taking initiative to build programs from scratch with minimal guidance.

 - Strong ownership mentality with focus on delivering results

 - Collaborative spirit with ability to influence across teams and geographies

Bonus points for:

 - Background in high-growth tech or startup environments

 - Existing relationships in Belgian media or influencer landscape

 - Understanding of Belgian B2B market or health insurance sector

For this opportunity, we are aiming to hire within the C0-C1 level https://alan.com/en/careers/a/salary-equityrange.


🙌 PERKS & BENEFITS https://alan.com/about/life-at-alan/a/perks

At Alan, we believe that being in good health is a basic need, and it starts with our employees. This is why Alaners are provided with a stimulating environment and perks ensuring they are happy, efficient and spend only high-quality time with co-workers.

Therefore, we offer:

 - Fair rewards. Generous equity packages complement your base salary.

 - Flexible Office. Amazing office space at our HQ in Paris, sponsored co-working hubs in Ghent Brussels or Antwerp or a full-remote experience with home office equipment sponsorship, we want you to live where you’re the happiest.

 - All the tools you need. Top of the range equipment: Macbook Pro, keyboard, laptop stand, monitor, and Bose noise-canceling headphones.

 - Flexible vacation policy and flexible working hours. organize your time as you wish.

 - Delightful healthcare insurance. Extremely comprehensive health insurance - 100% of the contribution covered by Alan for you and your family.

 - Transport. You can use your own inspiration based on the Green mobility budget (for Senior level Alaners).

 - Learning & Training opportunities. A highly flexible Training policy free books and budget to attend and speak at conferences if the opportunity arises.

 - Personal growth through coaching: At Alan, coaching isn't just a perk - ****it's core to who we are. Every Alaner is paired with a dedicated coach from day one, who helps maximize their impact, nurture engagement, and navigate Alan's values to develop their full potential. Learn more about our coaching culture https://alan.com/en/blog/discover-alan/a/alan-culture-excellence-through-coaching.

 - Parental leave. Extended parental leave for all new parents.


IMPORTANT NOTE: WE HIRE PEOPLE, NOT ROLES.

If you're excited about this opportunity but don't check every box, we'd love to hear from you. Everyone, no matter how underrepresented, should feel free to apply as it can only bring learnings or success.

If you identify yourself as a woman: Did you know that research shows women often apply only when meeting 100% of requirements?

Remember, this is just a guide, not a checklist. We'll be thrilled to receive your application!

🔖 Check out ourAbout Alan https://alan.com/about andCareer https://alan.com/careers pages, as well as ourMedium https://medium.com/alan,blog https://blog.alan.com/ andGlassdoor page https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Alan-EI_IE1696043.11,15.htm for more info.
fields.title: Brand Marketer - Belgium
